chapter_title.en: Chapter on Lost Property and Stray Animals

text: 4048 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ مَسْعَدَةَ بْنِ زِيَادٍ عَنِ اَلصَّادِقِ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّ عَلِيّاً صَلَوَاتُ اَللَّهِ وَ سَلاَمُهُ عَلَيْهِ قَالَ : "إِيَّاكُمْ وَ اَللُّقَطَةَ فَإِنَّهَا ضَالَّةُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِ وَ هِيَ حَرِيقٌ مِنْ حَرِيقِ جَهَنَّمَ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4048 - In a narration from Mas'adah ibn Ziyad, from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) from his father, Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), that Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said:
"Beware of taking lost property, for it is the loss of a believer, and it is a flame from the flames of Hell."
